name: Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 15 minutes Baking time: 17 to 20 minutes per batch
1. Heat oven to 300 degrees. Cream butter and sugar until smooth. Gradually add flour, mixing well after each addition. Stir in vanilla.
2. Form the dough into small walnut-sized balls. Roll each ball in sugar. Flatten with a cookie stamp or bottom of a glass. Place on an ungreased baking sheet.
3. Bake for 17 to 20 minutes, or until edges are lightly browned. This dough does not require chilling, rolling, or cutting; it can be easily doubled. Honorable mention went to Agnes Da Costa of Chicago from the Chicago Tribune's second annual Food Guide Holiday Cookie Contest on December 14, 1989.
